description: Enable Data Matrix 2D barcode recognition in bcWebCam. By default, bcWebCam might only scan QR codes and EAN barcodes. A pharmacy technician needs to scan Data Matrix codes on pharmaceutical packaging for DSCSA compliance. Open bcWebCam's Barcode Options (the barcode icon button, next to the gear icon in the bottom toolbar), find the 2D Barcode settings, check the 'Data Matrix' checkbox, and click OK to apply. Ensure the setting is saved.
